task: Improve password manager support for the native login form.
acceptance: Username input exposes username autofill semantics to native platforms.
Password input exposes password autofill semantics while preserving secure text entry.
Captcha input is excluded from credential autofill heuristics.
Two-factor code input is marked as one-time-code.
No login request, cookie, captcha, or 2FA state flow changes are introduced.
constraints: Keep the current React Native form and V2EX signin POST flow.
Do not introduce new password storage or credential persistence inside the app.
Do not weaken existing secureTextEntry behavior.
Full website credential matching still depends on iOS Associated Domains and Android Digital Asset Links controlled by the app/site owner.
